noContent.title: No feedback requests
noContent.newTasks: Received {count, plural, one {# new feedback request} other {# new feedback requests}}

page.countdown: {seconds, plural, one {#s until auto-reschedule} other {#s until auto-reschedule}}
page.codePasteHint: Due to browser security restrictions, clipboard cannot be read automatically. Please paste code below (iOS: long-press → paste), then click "Insert".
page.exportTasksBtnAriaLabel: Download current task list as a Markdown file

quickPhrases.label: Quick replies
quickPhrases.empty: No quick replies yet. Click "Add" to create one.
quickPhrases.disabled: Local storage is unavailable; quick replies disabled.
quickPhrases.errorTooMany: At most 20 quick replies can be saved
quickPhrases.exportBtnAriaLabel: Export quick replies as a JSON file
quickPhrases.importBtnAriaLabel: Import quick replies from a JSON file
quickPhrases.importErrorInvalidJson: Selected file is not valid JSON
quickPhrases.importErrorSchema: File does not look like a quick-replies export
quickPhrases.importErrorEmpty: File contains no valid quick replies
quickPhrases.importConfirmReplace: Replace all {{current}} current quick replies with {{count}} from file? This cannot be undone.
quickPhrases.importSuccessReplace: Replaced quick replies with {{count}} entries from file.

settings.barkUrlTemplateHint: Used when click action is "Open link" and the event metadata does not contain an explicit URL. Supports {task_id} / {event_id} / {base_url} placeholders. Unknown placeholders are kept as-is.
settings.baseUrlStatusOk: Current base_url: {url} (Bark notifications open correctly on mobile devices)
settings.baseUrlStatusLoopback: Current base_url is a loopback address ({url}). Mobile devices clicking the Bark notification will hit the phone itself and fail to open the Web UI.
settings.baseUrlStatusUnreachable: No externally reachable base_url detected. The Bark notification click URL will be omitted.
settings.baseUrlSuggestLan: Suggested fix: copy the LAN address below into web_ui.external_base_url, or change web_ui.host to 0.0.0.0/your LAN IP.
settings.baseUrlSuggestNoLan: No usable LAN interface detected (offline or blocked by VPN). Manually set web_ui.external_base_url to a reachable URL (e.g. https://ai.example.com).
settings.openConfigInIdeNoEditor: No supported IDE (Cursor / VS Code / Sublime / etc.) found in PATH.
settings.openConfigInIdeRemoteBlocked: Open-in-IDE is only available on the local machine running the server.
settings.autoResubmitTimeoutHint: Automatically resubmit feedback request when countdown expires. Range 10-3600 seconds, set to 0 to disable.
settings.resubmitPromptHint: Content auto-submitted when countdown expires (max 10000 chars)
settings.promptSuffixHint: Appended to every user feedback submission (max 10000 chars)

status.clipboardFailed: Cannot read clipboard, please paste manually
status.clipboardHttp: Current page is HTTP (insecure context), browser may block clipboard access. Please paste code manually below.
status.clipboardDenied: Browser denied clipboard access (may require permission or HTTPS). Please paste code manually below.
status.clipboardEmpty: No clipboard content found. Please paste code manually below.
status.clipboardTimeout: Browser did not return clipboard content in time. Please paste code manually below.
status.clipboardNoText: No insertable clipboard text detected. Please paste code manually below.
status.clipboardDefault: Due to browser security restrictions, clipboard cannot be read automatically. Please paste code manually below.
status.submitEmpty: Please enter feedback, select an option, or upload an image
status.configureBark: Please configure Bark URL and Device Key first
status.maxImages: Maximum {count, plural, one {# image} other {# images}} allowed
status.imageDuplicate: This image has already been added
status.processingBatch: Processing {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}}…
status.clipboardAdded: Added {count, plural, one {# image} other {# images}} from clipboard
status.noFileAPI: Current browser does not support File API, some features may not work
status.noCanvas: Current browser does not support Canvas, image compression will be disabled
status.imageInitFailed: Image feature initialization failed, please refresh the page
status.testNotifyBody: This is a test notification to verify the notification feature is working.

validation.fileTooSmall: File is too small ({{size}} bytes); it may be empty or corrupted
validation.filenamePathTraversal: File name contains path traversal characters

env.permDenied: Denied (please allow in browser site settings)

notify.testBody: This is a test notification to verify your current settings are working correctly

shortcuts.notifyBody: {{mod}}+Enter submit | T toggle theme | Esc close modal

message.default: Waiting for the next feedback request.

message.network: Network unavailable. Please check your connection.
message.server_500: Server returned an error. Please try again later.
message.timeout: Request timed out. The server may be busy.
